_meta.purpose: List-factory queue. Each entry is a niche the autonomous list-generator will turn into a Top 11 ranked list. Workers pop the head of `pending` and write the JSON to data/<slug>.json + register in lib/lists.ts.
_meta.throughput_target: 1–3 lists per 4-hour cron run = 6–18 lists/day = ~300–900 derived pages/day at full cadence.
_meta.selection_principle: Each niche must satisfy: (a) genuine search demand in the question shapes we own, (b) low-competition long-tail where a brand-new domain can rank within 30 days, (c) the editor (Hayat Amin) is NOT a candidate. These niches are open territory — no editor disclosure required.
